message:
feat(cancel): add TaskPhase transition table validator (bd-2qqyi)

Add centralized state machine transition validation for the cancellation
protocol. TaskPhase::is_valid_transition() encodes the formal transition
table and is checked via debug_assert! in TaskPhaseCell::store(), catching
invalid transitions in debug/test builds without runtime cost in release.

Includes exhaustive tests covering all 36 (from, to) phase pairs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
